diff --git a/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Billing/Codeunits/CreateBillingDocuments.Codeunit.al b/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Billing/Codeunits/CreateBillingDocuments.Codeunit.al
index c7efaed2..a1777faf 100644
--- a/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Billing/Codeunits/CreateBillingDocuments.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Billing/Codeunits/CreateBillingDocuments.Codeunit.al
@@ -870,13 +870,18 @@ codeunit 8060 "Create Billing Documents"
 
     local procedure TestPreviousDocumentTotalInvoiceAmount(Sales: Boolean; DiscountLineExists: Boolean; PreviousContractNo: Code[20])
     var
+        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
         AmountToCheck: Decimal;
     begin
         OnBeforeTestPreviousDocumentTotalInvoiceAmount(Sales, DiscountLineExists, PreviousContractNo, SalesHeader, PurchaseHeader);
-        if not DiscountLineExists then
-            exit;
         if PreviousContractNo = '' then
             exit;
+
+        if Sales then
+            SalesLine.CalcSalesTaxLines(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
+
+        if not DiscountLineExists then
+            exit;
         if Sales then begin
             SalesHeader.CalcFields(Amount);
             AmountToCheck := SalesHeader.Amount;
diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLine.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLine.Table.al

@@ -8564,6 +8564,17 @@ table 37 "Sales Line"
             exit(SalesSetup."Document Default Line Type");
     end;
 
+    /// <summary>
+    /// Calculates sales tax lines for a sales document.
+    /// This is a stub procedure that is overridden in the NA layer with actual sales tax calculation logic.
+    /// </summary>
+    /// <param name="SalesHeader">The sales header for which to calculate sales tax.</param>
+    /// <param name="SalesLine">The sales line record used for the calculation.</param>
+    procedure CalcSalesTaxLines(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
+    begin
+        OnAfterCalcSalesTaxLines(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
+    end;
+
     local procedure CheckWMS()
     begin
         if (CurrFieldNo <> 0) or (SalesHeader."VAT Bus. Posting Group" <> Rec."VAT Bus. Posting Group") then
@@ -12294,4 +12305,9 @@ table 37 "Sales Line"
     local procedure OnCalcVATAmountLinesOnBeforeGetDeferralAmount(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
     begin
     end;
+
+    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
+    local procedure OnAfterCalcSalesTaxLines(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
+    begin
+    end;
 }

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al
index 82a002f3..abd358ba 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLinePrice.Codeunit.al
@@ -80,10 +80,13 @@ codeunit 7023 "Job Journal Line - Price" implements "Line With Price"
                             Result or
                             not (CalledByFieldNo in [JobJournalLine.FieldNo(Quantity), JobJournalLine.FieldNo("Variant Code")]);
                     CurrPriceType::Purchase:
-                        Result :=
-                            Result or
-                            not ((CalledByFieldNo = JobJournalLine.FieldNo(Quantity)) or
-                                ((CalledByFieldNo = JobJournalLine.FieldNo("Variant Code")) and not IsSKU))
+                        if (JobJournalLine."Unit Cost" = 0) and (JobJournalLine.Quantity <> 0) then
+                            Result := true
+                        else
+                            Result :=
+                                Result or
+                                not ((CalledByFieldNo = JobJournalLine.FieldNo(Quantity)) or
+                                    ((CalledByFieldNo = JobJournalLine.FieldNo("Variant Code")) and not IsSKU))
                 end;
         OnAfterIsPriceUpdateNeeded(AmountType, FoundPrice, CalledByFieldNo, JobJournalLine, Result);
     end;

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al

+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -1309,7 +1309,7 @@ codeunit 99000774 "Calculate Routing Line"
         end;
 
         MaxLotSize :=
-          ExpectedOperOutput *
+          ProdOrderQty *
           (1 + ProdOrderRoutingLine."Scrap Factor % (Accumulated)") *
           (1 + TotalScrap / 100) +
           ProdOrderRoutingLine."Fixed Scrap Qty. (Accum.)";

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Pricing/PriceList/PriceListHeader.Table.al

@@ -563,9 +563,10 @@ table 7000 "Price List Header"
         xAmountType: Enum "Price Amount Type";
     begin
         xAmountType := "Amount Type";
-        if "Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"] then
-            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType()
-        else
+        if "Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"] then begin
+            CopyTo(PriceSource);
+            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType();
+        end else
             "Amount Type" := CalcAmountType();
         if "Amount Type" <> xAmountType then
             Modify()

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al
index 1e465e16..62cc18fb 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al
@@ -397,9 +397,8 @@ codeunit 1002 "Job Create-Invoice"
         else begin
             if OldJobNo <> '' then begin
                 if InvoicePerTask then
-                    if (OldJobNo <> JobTask."Job No.") or (OldJobTaskNo <> JobTask."Job Task No.") then
-                        NewInvoice := true;
-                if not InvoicePerTask then
+                    NewInvoice := IsNewInvoiceRequiredForJobTask(JobTask)
+                else
                     if OldJobNo <> JobTask."Job No." then
                         NewInvoice := true;
             end;
@@ -411,6 +410,25 @@ codeunit 1002 "Job Create-Invoice"
         exit(NewInvoice);
     end;
 
+    local procedure IsNewInvoiceRequiredForJobTask(JobTask: Record "Job Task"): Boolean
+    var
+        FirstJobTask: Record "Job Task";
+    begin
+        if not TempJobPlanningLine.Find('-') then
+            exit(false);
+
+        if not FirstJobTask.Get(TempJobPlanningLine."Job No.", TempJobPlanningLine."Job Task No.") then
+            exit(true);
+
+        if (JobTask."Sell-to Customer No." <> FirstJobTask."Sell-to Customer No.") or
+           (JobTask."Bill-to Customer No." <> FirstJobTask."Bill-to Customer No.") or
+           (JobTask."Invoice Currency Code" <> FirstJobTask."Invoice Currency Code")
+        then
+            exit(true);
+
+        exit(false);
+    end;
+
     local procedure CreateSalesHeader(Job: Record Job; PostingDate: Date; DocumentDate: Date; JobPlanningLine: Record "Job Planning Line")
     var
         JobTask: Record "Job Task";
